title: Norfolk Southern seeks to boost capacity through hiring, operational changes
text: Norfolk Southern admits that its rail network is congested, particularly for international intermodal and automotive products services. But the railroad hopes that aggressive efforts to hire additional employees will address the capacity constraints, NS President Alan Shaw said at the Citi industrial tech and mobility conference this week.

title: Bert's January 2022 Dividend Income Summary
text: Between inflation, interest rate hikes, and potential global conflicts, the market continues to swing up and down on a regular basis.

title: Norfolk Southern offering starting bonuses of up to $5,000 for conductor trainees
text: ATLANTA, Feb. 17, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE: NSC) today announced that it is offering starting bonuses of up to $5,000 for conductor trainees in priority locations, and $2,500 for other locations. Priority locations include: Binghamton, NY; Buffalo, NY; Cincinnati, OH; Louisville, KY; Manassas, VA; Harrisburg, PA; Conway, PA; Birmingham, AL; Sheffield, AL; Chattanooga, TN; Roanoke, VA; and Linwood, NC.

title: Norfolk Southern appoints Paul B. Duncan vice president of network planning and operations, John Friedmann to retire
text: ATLANTA, Feb. 17, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE: NSC) announced today that Paul B. Duncan has been appointed Vice President Network Planning and Operations.

title: Norfolk Southern names McClellan, Nag to senior executive roles; Moore appointed VP & Controller
text: ATLANTA, Feb. 10, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE: NSC) today announced three promotions in executive management.  Michael McClellan  is appointed Senior Vice President & Chief Strategy Officer.

title: Norfolk Southern recognized as a CDP Supplier Engagement Leader
text: ATLANTA, Feb. 10, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE: NSC) has earned a spot on CDP's 2021 Supplier Engagement Leaderboard. Norfolk Southern was recently recognized with an A- climate change rating in CDP's highest rated tier, the Leadership Level.
